title: Lightfootia ramosissima
taxonomy: Lightfootia ramosissima is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Lightfootia ramosissima is as follows: it is a genus of flowering plants in the family Campanulaceae, subfamily Lobelioideae. The genus Lightfootia is named after John Lightfoot, a British clergyman and botanist. This plant is further classified into the kingdom Plantae.
